name: Verizon Connect Fleet API
what_it_does: Verizon Connect REST API for fleet management and telematics platform. Enables AI agents to query vehicle location data, retrieve trip history, access driver behavior analytics, monitor equipment, and integrate fleet intelligence into logistics and operations workflows. Verizon Connect is one of the largest fleet management providers in North America.
use_cases: Querying real-time vehicle location and routing data from fleet operations agents
Retrieving driver behavior and safety scores from fleet safety analytics agents
Accessing equipment utilization and maintenance data from asset management agents
Integrating Verizon Connect fleet data into logistics and dispatch workflow agents
best_when: A fleet operator using Verizon Connect wants AI agents to monitor vehicle operations, analyze driver behavior, optimize dispatch, and integrate telematics data into safety and logistics workflows. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY.
avoid_when: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver location and behavior monitoring data requires legitimate fleet authority and employee disclosure per employment law. Contact Verizon Connect for API developer access.

auth.notes: Verizon Connect API uses OAuth 2.0. Developer access requires Verizon Connect enterprise account and API partner agreement.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per device per month pricing; fleet management subscription
pricing.notes: Enterprise fleet platform. API access requires Verizon Connect partner agreement.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver location monitoring requires fleet authority and employee disclosure
No public MCP server — enterprise API requires partner agreement
API documentation not publicly available — requires Verizon Connect enterprise access
Rate limits undocumented for public — contact Verizon Connect for API specifications
Driver behavior data is sensitive — requires clear disclosure and consent policies
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY. Driver location and behavior monitoring. SOC2. Employment law disclosure requirements. Enterprise partner API only.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY. Driver monitoring data. SOC2. Employment law consent requirements for North American fleets.
